Services Process Case Study Case Study Classes Blog About Get Started

Trademark Search

Before filing, we conduct comprehensive searches across the CNIPA database, domain registries, and major e-commerce platforms to identify potential conflicts.

  • ✓ Full CNIPA database search across all 45 classes
  • ✓ Phonetic and visual similarity analysis
  • ✓ Domain and social media availability check
  • ✓ Detailed risk assessment report with recommendations
48h

Average turnaround for search reports

01 Class selection & strategy
02 Application drafting & submission
03 Substantive examination tracking
04 Office action responses
05 Registration certificate

Filing & Prosecution

We handle the entire filing process from class strategy to certificate issuance. Our CNIPA-licensed agents prepare and submit applications with optimal specifications.

Typical registration timeline: 6-9 months from filing to certificate, depending on examination workload.

Opposition & Defense

When conflicts arise, we represent you in opposition proceedings, cancellation actions, and bad-faith filing disputes before CNIPA and the courts.

  • ✓ Opposition filing and defense
  • ✓ Non-use cancellation actions
  • ✓ Invalidation proceedings
  • ✓ Bad-faith filing challenges
"They identified a squatter who had registered our brand name in three classes. Through strategic opposition, they recovered all three marks within 8 months."

— CEO, European Fashion Brand

24/7

Continuous monitoring of new filings

Brand Monitoring

Proactive surveillance of new trademark applications that may conflict with your registered marks. We alert you early so you can act within the opposition window.

International Filing

For brands expanding globally, we coordinate Madrid Protocol filings and multi-jurisdiction trademark strategies across Asia-Pacific and beyond.

  • ✓ Madrid Protocol designations
  • ✓ Paris Convention priority claims
  • ✓ Multi-country filing coordination
3

China (serving international clients)

Pricing

Transparent Pricing

All prices in CNY (Chinese Yuan). USD pricing available on request (approx. $1 = ¥7.25). Service fees only — official CNIPA fees apply separately.

Service Description Timeline Price (CNY) Price (USD)
Trademark Registration New application for brand protection ~12 months ¥1,500 $200
Trademark Review Appeal a rejected application Within 9 months ¥6,000 $830
Trademark Opposition Challenge squatted or conflicting marks ~12 months ¥5,500 $760
Domestic Change Name/address change on record 3 months ¥800 $110
Certificate Reissue Lost or damaged certificate replacement ~3 months ¥2,000 $275
Domestic Renewal Renew before 10-year expiry Standard ¥2,500 $345
Renewal (Grace Period) Renewal within 6 months after expiry 3 months ¥3,000 $415
Withdrawal of Application Voluntary withdrawal of a filing — ¥1,200 $165
Cancellation (3-Year Non-Use) Remove marks unused for 3+ years Within 9 months ¥5,500 $760
Domestic Cancellation Voluntary cancellation of a registration 3-4 months ¥1,200 $165
Trademark Transfer Assign ownership of a mark 4-8 months ¥2,200 $300
Trademark Defense Opposition/cancellation defense — ¥4,500 $620

Bundled Packages

Save when you bundle services together.

Brand Registration Bundle

Registration + Change + Renewal — everything to establish and maintain your brand in China.

¥4,000 / $550

  • ✓ Domestic Change (¥800)
  • ✓ Domestic Renewal (¥2,500)

¥12,000 / $1,655

  • ✓ Domestic Renewal (¥2,500)
  • ✓ Trademark Defense (¥4,500)

Save ¥2,000 vs. buying separately

Faster processing for time-sensitive filings

¥500/hr

Consultation

Expert trademark strategy consultation (~$70/hr)

¥300/mo

Brand Monitoring

Ongoing watch for conflicting filings (~$40/mo)

All prices represent service fees only. Official CNIPA filing fees and publication fees are charged separately. Volume discounts available for enterprise clients.

100%

Coverage at China's major ports

Customs Recordal

Register your trademarks with China Customs to enable automatic interception of counterfeit goods at ports and borders. We handle the full recordal process and maintain ongoing coordination with customs authorities.

Need a Custom Package?

We tailor our services to your specific needs and budget.
